title: OptiPandora
description: A simple optimization modpack for Fabric.
body:
OptiPandora [Fabric] includes mods like [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium), [Noisium](https://modrinth.com/mod/noisium) and [FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core) for higher fps and performance in Minecraft, and also includes [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity) (Connected texture support), [Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) (adds more player and entity appearance features), [Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) (adds support for Optifine's Custom Entity Models) for resource packs.

I plan on keeping this modpack as the basis for future fabric modpacks.


<details>
<summary>Other mods in OptiPandora [Fabric] version</summary>
  
- [Fabrishot](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabrishot)
- [ImmediatelyFast](https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast)
- [BetterF3](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterf3)
- [Better Third Person](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-third-person)
- [Cull Leaves](https://modrinth.com/mod/cull-leaves)
- [Fabric Language Kotlin](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-language-kotlin)
- [Cloth Config](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)
- [OptiGUI](https://modrinth.com/mod/optigui)
- [Dynamic FPS](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamic-fps)
- [Entity Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling)
- [Enhanced Block Entities](https://modrinth.com/mod/ebe)
- [Indium](https://modrinth.com/mod/indium)
- [Sodium Extra](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-extra)
- [Model Gap Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/modelfix)
- [Iris Shaders](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris)
- [Text Placeholder API](https://modrinth.com/mod/placeholder-api)
- [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium)
- [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)
- [ModernFix](https://modrinth.com/mod/modernfix)
- [3D Skin Layers](https://modrinth.com/mod/3dskinlayers)

</details>

OptiPandora [Neoforge] includes mods like [Embeddium](https://modrinth.com/mod/embeddium), [Noisium](https://modrinth.com/mod/noisium) and [FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core) for higher fps and performance in Minecraft, and also includes [Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) (adds more player and entity appearance features), [Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) (adds support for Optifine's Custom Entity Models) for resource packs.

I plan on keeping this modpack as the basis for future neoforge modpacks.


<details>
<summary>Other mods in OptiPandora [Neoforge] version</summary>

- [ImmediatelyFast](https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast)
- [BetterF3](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterf3)
- [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)
- [Cull Leaves](https://modrinth.com/mod/cull-leaves)
- [Dynamic FPS](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamic-fps)
- [Entity Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling)
- [Model Gap Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/modelfix)
- [MidnightLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/midnightlib)
- [ModernFix](https://modrinth.com/mod/modernfix)
- [3D Skin Layers](https://modrinth.com/mod/3dskinlayers)

</details>
